## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Goodcall to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps for SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content publishing progress: 150 articles published, 25 pending; seeing growth in impressions (8K) and clicks (10-11 daily avg)](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Webflow CMS issue causing \~50% of articles to have missing content; needs urgent resolution](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Call center automation/productivity identified as next priority cluster for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Need to improve publishing workflow efficiency and explore programmatic options for scaling](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Progress

  - [150 articles published across 3 main buckets:](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [Selling services: 69 articles](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Appointment scheduling: 59 articles](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Salon: 25 articles](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Week 5: 9 articles ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Week 6 topics to be discussed](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Impressions grew from \~100K to 8K daily average](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Clicks increased to 10-11 daily average](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Top performing articles:](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
      - [Appointment scheduling software for healthcare](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [Best answering service for medical offices](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [Interplay (appointment scheduling software)](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

### Webflow CMS Issues

  - [\~50% of articles affected by content not displaying properly](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Impacting ability to accurately measure performance](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Urgent need to resolve for full content visibility and URL structure optimization](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

### Next Content Cluster: Call Centers

  - [Focus on call center automation and productivity](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Target audience: Call center owners/managers (100-500 employees)](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Key topics:](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [Increasing revenue and productivity](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Data insights and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
      - [AI automation (voice agents, authentication)](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
      - [Improving NPS scores](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [Cost reduction strategies](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

### Publishing Workflow Improvements

  - [Current manual copy-paste process is inefficient for scaling](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Need to explore programmatic publishing options](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Clarify roles between SEO team and Webflow management](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Standardize CMS structure and variable naming conventions](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Resolve Webflow CMS content display issues](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Implement tracking to understand user paths from articles to conversion](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Explore options for more efficient/programmatic content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Develop content strategy for call center automation/productivity cluster](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Research enterprise call center data sources to inform new content](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Create new CMS structure for BPO/call center articles after keyword analysis](https://fathom.video/share/1WwSsDddTG2c8SPbrWNLyxtMnzFKBBQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
